usb_only.title: Enable a manageable Android transport
usb_only.summary: ForgeOS can see the phone over USB, but the phone is still exposing only MTP or generic USB visibility.
steps: Open Settings and go to About phone.
Tap Build number 7 times to enable Developer Options.
Open Developer Options and enable USB debugging.
Reconnect the USB cable if the phone stays in charge-only or MTP-only mode.
Approve the Allow USB debugging prompt on the phone if it appears.
usb_only.expected_next_state: adb unauthorized, then adb connected after trust approval
troubleshooting: Use a known-good USB data cable, not a charge-only cable.
Keep the phone unlocked while connecting it.
If the USB mode chooser appears, prefer file transfer or data mode over charge only.

adb_unauthorized.title: Approve USB debugging on the phone
adb_unauthorized.summary: The phone is visible to adb, but it has not yet trusted this computer.
steps: Look for the Allow USB debugging prompt.
If no prompt appears, reconnect the cable and keep the screen awake.
troubleshooting: If the trust prompt does not appear, toggle USB debugging off and back on.
Revoke USB debugging authorizations and reconnect if the phone is stuck.

adb_connected.title: adb transport is ready
adb_connected.summary: ForgeOS can now interrogate the phone non-destructively and prepare backup and restore artifacts.
steps: Leave the phone connected and unlocked.
Let ForgeOS capture backup metadata before any destructive action.
Review the flash plan and restore readiness before approving a wipe.

fastboot_connected.title: fastboot transport is ready
fastboot_connected.summary: ForgeOS can continue low-level transport assessment and flash planning from fastboot.
steps: Keep the device on the fastboot screen.
Wait for ForgeOS to capture low-level device facts and rollback evidence.
Do not unlock or wipe anything until the restore path is reviewed.

default.title: Connection setup guidance
default.summary: ForgeOS is waiting for a transport it can manage safely.
steps: Enable USB debugging if Android is booted.
Reconnect the cable and wait for ForgeOS to refresh.
